title: Shinobi No Mono 3: Resurrection
actors: Raizô Ichikawa, Ayako Wakao, Eijirô Tôno
plot: When we last saw the intrepid ninja Ishikawa Goemon (Raizo Ichikawa), he was about to be boiled alive. But a good ninja is both hard to find, and even harder to kill. With the help of the enigmatic Hattori Hanzo, Goemon lives to s...
